programme.title: Tierra de vampiros
programme.desc: Estados Unidos es una nación perdida. Cuando se desata una epidemia de vampirismo y su familia es asesinada, el joven Martin (Connor Paolo) se vuelve el protegido de un canoso y obstinado cazador (Nick Damici) cuya nueva presa son los muertos vivientes.

programme.title: Tierra de vampiros II
programme.desc: Tras el asesinato de su familia, Martin se adentra en las tierras baldías de Estados Unidos en busca de Mister con la esperanza de volver a asociarse con él para combatir una nueva amenaza de vampiros.

programme.title: Kalifornia
programme.desc: Una pareja decide ir a conocer los lugares donde se cometieron los crímenes de un libro de asesinos en serie, pero ni se imaginan que no tienen que ir muy lejos para conocer a unos brutales criminales.

programme.title: Stephen King: Al filo del abismo
programme.desc: Un empresario emergente ha decidido comprar el viejo molino textil de Gates Fall. Para poner su negocio en marcha, se ve obligado a contratar a un grupo de hombres para que le ayuden a despejar los sótanos y a realizar la limpieza del lugar.

programme.title: Stephen King's Silver Bullet
programme.desc: En esta película de terror, basada en la novela Ciclo del hombre lobo, de Stephen King. Un hombre lobo está aterrorizando a un pequeño pueblo y depende de un niño discapacitado, y su tío para liberar la ciudad.

programme.title: Halloween VI: The Curse of Michael Myers ES
programme.desc: El pueblo de Haddonfield, Illinois, celebra Halloween por primera vez en cinco años, pero el asesino en masa maníaco Michael Myers se une a las festividades, con su némesis, el Dr. Loomis, un empedernido psiquiatra, pisándole los talones.

programme.title: Halloween: 20 años después
programme.desc: Hace 20 años, el mal escapó bajo la forma de Michael Myers, lo cual llevó a una sangrienta matanza en Halloween. Ahora, Michael ha vuelto para aterrorizar a una nueva generación, comenzando por la sobreviviente Laurie Strode (Jamie Lee Curtis).

programme.title: Christmas in Compton
programme.desc: Una semana antes de la gran fiesta estallan los problemas en el lote de árboles de Navidad de Big Earl. Su hijo, Derrick, un aspirante a productor musical, junto con un grupo de pintorescos personajes, se suman al drama.

programme.title: Popeye
programme.desc: El legendario y querido marinero de los siete mares, armado con un yunque, cobra vida mágicamente en este encantador musical, protagonizado por Robin Williams como Popeye.

programme.title: Perdidos en Nueva York
programme.desc: La pasión del matrimonio entre Henry y Nancy Clark desapareció hace mucho tiempo. Pero ahora su hijo menor ha abandonado el nido y los Clarks tienen la oportunidad de trasladarse a Nueva York.

programme.title: ¿Solo amigos?
programme.desc: Harto de malas relaciones, Wallace (Daniel Radcliffe), que abandonó su carrera de medicina, decide poner su vida amorosa en pausa. Tras enamorarse de Chantry (Zoe Kazan), una animadora que vive con su novio Ben (Rafe Spall), el "amor" se complica.

programme.title: Una guerra de película
programme.desc: Ben Stiller, Jack Black y Robert Downey Jr. encabezan un reparto singular en 'Una Guerra de Película', una comedia de acción sobre un grupo de actores que se disponen a realizar la película de guerra más cara.

programme.title: Lo que ellas quieren
programme.desc: Nick Marshall (Mel Gibson), un ejecutivo publicitario y soltero promiscuo, obtiene accidentalmente el poder de oír lo que piensan las mujeres. Nick decide usar su nuevo poder para sabotear a su jefa, Darcy (Helen Hunt), y avanzar en su propia carrera.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: John Wayne plays Hondo Lane, a cavalry rider who becomes the protector of Angie Lowe as well as a father figure to her boy, Johnny. Angie, determinedly awaiting the return of her husband, refuses to leave their homestead despite the growing danger.

programme.title: Day of the Gun
programme.desc: Set in 1890's Montana, a conflict between the widowed Maggie Carter and cattle baron Cyrus McCall escalates into a 'range war' when McCall threatens her survival as a rancher by putting up a barbed...

programme.title: The Sons of Katie Elder
programme.desc: The four rowdy sons of Katie Elder return home for her funeral and to avenge her death.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs, and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: The cattle rancher McLintock (John Wayne) puts his brand on the territory and every woman in it! Louise Warren plays a widow who moves with her two children onto McLintock’s ranch to serve as cook, while Maureen O’Hara plays the estranged wife.

programme.title: The Horse Soldiers
programme.desc: John Wayne, Constance Towers and William Holden star in this 1863, fact-based story about a Union mission to destroy a railroad junction deep within Confederate territory.

programme.title: South Pacific
programme.desc: On a South Pacific island during World War II, love blooms between a young nurse and a secretive Frenchman who's being courted for a dangerous military mission.

programme.title: The Rainmaker
programme.desc: Katharine Hepburn garnered an Oscar nomination as the "plain yet magnetically beautiful" tomboy rancher, with Burt Lancaster brilliantly cast in the role of the smooth-talking con man.

programme.title: The Bells Of St Mary's
programme.desc: At a big city Catholic school, Father O'Malley and Sister Benedict indulge in friendly rivalry, and succeed in extending the school through the gift of a building.

programme.title: The Miracle Worker
programme.desc: Academy Awards went to Best Actress Anne Bancroft and Best Supporting Actress Patty Duke for their moving portrayals of Annie Sullivan and her remarkable blind and deaf pupil, Helen Keller.

programme.title: Oklahoma! (1955)
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, several farmers, cowboys and a traveling salesman compete for the romantic favors of various local ladies.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: When Gomer's cousin Goober shows up in the barracks and puts on one of Gomer's uniforms and then wanders the base, everyone sees the name Pyle on the uniform and thinks Gomer is losing his mind.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob's friendship with Jerry is almost destroyed in a feud over a neighbor's crabgrass.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: When Rob is offered a job as a humor consultant at a magazine for man-about-town, he runs into trouble with Laura.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Sally is romanced by a secret admirer when the owner of a delicatessen delivers flowers with her sandwich.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob and Laura are on their way to visit the doctor when they are trapped in a stalled elevator with a man who attempts to rob them.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The 'Alan Brady' writers entertain at a prison and Rob gets locked up with the inmates.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob puts his job at risk when he convinces Alan Brady to host a cultural documentary program.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Laura takes two of Millie's prescription pills and suffers disastrous side effects.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob tries to get a raise for Buddy and Sally from Alan Brady's tight-fisted accountant.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Oscar becomes a somnambulist and vents his frustrations against Felix.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: After their apartment is robbed, Felix talks Oscar into moving in. The new dwelling is a super-security building supervised by an over-zealous manager.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Oscar discovers he's in poor physical condition and reluctantly goes along with Felix's suggestion that he build himself up.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Hoping to get closer to his son, Felix becomes coach of the boy's football team.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: After Felix induces Oscar to appear on the popular talk show Steinberg is guest-hosting, his roommate gives a riotous account of Felix's prissiness. Felix is incensed, and when Steinberg invites him to make a rebuttal, he leaps at the opportunity.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Blanche tells Oscar she is remarrying and invites him and Felix to the wedding.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix talks Oscar into being a big brother to Mike, a young boy in a reform school.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Oscar hires Felix to cover an international wrestling match and is thrown for a fall by subsequent developments.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies fall victim to a Hollywood-style roller coaster ride when a production company visits to do a film on taxi drivers. Life at the Sunshine Cab Company turns into a continual champagne and buffet festivity.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When John crashes Cab 804, the cabbies are shocked into a period of mourning, as they reminisce about the wild and memorable events that occurred when they were driving the legendary cab.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas frantically works to save the cracked-up Cab 804 as the cabbies fondly recall times in the legendary auto when Alex delivered a baby, Louie beat a rich brat out of a wad of money, and Elaine met the perfect man.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a dream come true for Tony when he’s challenged by an aging ex-champ, but he has more than just a fight on his hand when the opposition unveils its secret weapon.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies are in for a comedy surprise when the small town kid Bobby befriends, Steve, lands a big role as Romeo the first day he arrives in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex tells Elaine that her hectic schedule of being a mother, a cabbie and a museum employee is driving her crazy and that she should see a psychiatrist. Elaine decides that a quicker cure would be to spend the night with Alex.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Arnold Ziffel, Hooterville's beloved swine is thought to have rightful claim to a $20,000 fortune. The Birnbacher pork empire has promised that the descendant of the famous weather-predicting pig, Herman, will inherit the vast sum.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver, Lisa and Eb travel to Chicago with Arnold to prove the pig is the rightful heir to the Birnbacher pork empire. Will this pig get rich? Arnold makes a surprising prediction that baffles all, including all the lawyers involved.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa foretells of a mysterious stranger that will appear into Oliver's life. Enter Tadpole Talbot, Eb's childhood friend who has become a singing sensation. Tadpole has convinced Eb to go out on the road with him and join his band as a roadie.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver is asked to speak at the local high school about his illustrious law career and makes quite an impression on student Kathy Baxter. Oliver must contend with Kathy's fawning as well as her jealous boyfriend is not very happy with Oliver.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: A woman murders her wealthy, abusive husband with the help of her lover. All appear to be working according to their plan until the initial evidence points to her stepson as the main suspect; however, as more evidence emerges, the focus shifts.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: When Christine Rankin, the first Black female officer on the Sparta police force, is killed during the capture of a murder suspect, the city council makes plans to suspend Gillespie, but he voluntarily steps down and sets out to get justice.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: As the arrests grow, Gillespie, Tibbs and the Sparta police force are desperate to halt the spread of crack cocaine among the young people of their town, and no one is more motivated than Officer Willson Sweet, whose cousin died from using the drug.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Gillespie is let go after being abducted by white supremacists right before the upcoming visit of a civil rights leader, Rev. John Carter, and the anniversary of a historic march. Tibbs is excited to meet Carter, but Gillespie anticipates trouble.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Officer Parker Williams must face his feelings when his neighbor, a dance instructor he's fallen for, is accused of killing a private investigator who was hot on her trail regarding the alleged abduction of the child she's raising as her daughter.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Two men are determined to avenge their brother's death after he is killed in a thwarted armed robbery by an off-duty Lieutenant Bubba Skinner. Chief Gillespie must prepare to do all he can to keep Bubba safe. Now, he just needs Bubba to cooperate.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: While hitchhiking his way to Sparta to visit Chief Gillespie, a Vietnamese teenager, Hank, witnesses a store robbery that turns into a murder. Hank was hoping that Gillespie would help him acquire citizenship, but now he's being framed for murder.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Ex-prizefighter, King Baylor, tries to blackmail his old boss, John Caminetto, a mafia kingpin in Detroit, who is wanted by the FBI. The FBI offers Baylor a deal, but he's desperate for cash and thinks he can force Caminetto to pay a bigger sum.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Amos Haber, a close friend of Chief Gillespie's, is devastated over the death of his wife and angrily blames her doctor, vowing revenge. When the doctor is found shot to death, the bullets match a gun belonging to Amos, but is Amos the killer?

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: A mild-mannered Sparta businessman shoots his wife and her lover and then flees with his daughter, holding her hostage in the family cabin out in the woods. The Sparta police must move with caution in fear he may shoot his daughter and then himself.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: After $100,000 goes missing from the bank where he works, Daryl Tyler, a friend of Bubba's, is framed for theft and kills himself. Only his young son knows the truth that could clear his late father's name; however, for now, he won't say a word.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Althea Tibbs finds Lydia Crane, an elderly resident of a local nursing home, wandering along the railroad tracks in the early morning hours. Ms. Crane informs Chief Gillespie that a murder has taken place at the home, and she fears she is next.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: When Sgt. Lonnie Jamison picks up Jana Craven and her friends for cutting school, a simple truancy bust turns into a complicated murder case for the Sparta police involving the disappearance of Jana's mother, Colleen, and her abusive father, Frank.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Someone mysteriously leaves a baby on Lieutenant Bubba Skinner's doorstep. When the Sparta police search for the mother, they uncover a car submerged in a lake and the dead body of the baby's mother inside, but who and where is the baby's father?

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The curator of a murderers' row in a soon-to-be-defunct wax museum persuades the owner to let him keep the figures for awhile.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bored, wealthy businessman gets a chance to go back in time and start over, armed with all the knowledge he's acquired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Toy designer Horace Ford spends most of his time reminiscing about his idyllic childhood. But when he gets a chance to go back to those years he gets a bitter taste of reality.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man named Benteen leads a colony of Americans stranded on a desert planet for 30 years.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A young couple book passage on a trans-Atlantic cruise, hoping to salvage their marriage.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An untalented would-be writer's career takes off when the ghost of William Shakespeare writes his script.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mike Ferris finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. But despite the emptiness, he has the odd feeling that he's being watched...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An aging, former movie star lives and dreams in the past, constantly watching her old movies alone in her room.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Corry is stranded on an asteroid after being convicted of a crime. He receives as a present a robot who looks, sounds, and acts like a real woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bank teller, Henry Bemis, longs for time alone to read books. He gets his wish...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there, and an overwhelming sense of impending doom.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts have returned from this first space flight. Major Gart is hospitalized with a broken leg. The other two, Colonels Harrington and Forbes head for a bar. Harrington gets a strange feeling…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A two-bit thug thinks he's found the key to a better life in an old sidewalk salesman who has the uncanny ability to tell people what they need the most.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man who can change his face to resemble others gets into hot water with gangsters.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: With all-out nuclear war about to ignite, a scientist and his pilot friend plot to escape on an experimental spaceship.

programme.title: The Best of The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: Ed Sullivan presents Ella Fitzgerald, Juliet Prowse and Hugh Lambert Dancers, Elizabeth and Collins, Marilyn Michaels, Sammy Davis, Jr., and Rip Taylor.

programme.title: The Best of The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: Ed Sullivan presents The Beach Boys, The Muppets, Richard Pryor, and Pearl Bailey.

programme.title: Comedy Legends from The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: Richard Pryor's "Fishing"; Kaye Ballard's "Teenagers and Mother's Always Right"; Myron Cohen's "Stories"; Lord Buckley's "The Jersey Switch"; Skiles and Henderson's "Racing

programme.title: The Best of The Ed Sullivan Show

programme.title: Comedy Legends from The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: Richard Pryor's "Submarine Warfare"; Jack Paar's "Wardrobe Mistake and Magazine Ads"; Stiller and Meara's "Parent of College Protester"; Jackie Gleason and Art Carney's "Poor Guy Routine

programme.title: The Very Best of The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: Carol Burnett hosts a retrospective of the very best moments from The Ed Sullivan Show, featuring performances from some of the biggest stars of music and comedy, stories about the show, interviews from Ed's favorite performers, and so much more!

programme.title: The Best of The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: Ed Sullivan presents Gladys Knight and The Pips, Melba Moore, Richard Pryor, Connie Francis, Tel Smit, and Roy Clark.

programme.title: The Best of The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: Ed Sullivan presents The Rolling Stones, Richard Pryor, Allen & Rossi, Wayne Newton, Ed Ames, and Debbie Reynolds

programme.title: Ed Sullivan’s 50th Anniversary
programme.desc: A nostalgic tribute to the legendary Ed Sullivan Show, which ran for 23 years. Hosted by The Smothers Brothers, the retrospective features historical clips from artists spanning the genres of novelty, comedy, pop music, and rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: The Best of The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: Ed Sullivan presents The Beatles, Richard Pryor, Senor Wences, Joan Rivers, Erich Brenn, George Carlin, Topo Gigio, and Elvis Presley.

programme.title: Comedy Legends from The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: Ed Sullivan presents Richard Pryor, Rip Taylor, Ron Carey, and Totie Fields.

programme.title: All-Star Comedy from the Ed Sullivan Show with Mary Tyler Moore
programme.desc: Hosted by Mary Tyler Moore, this "All-Star Comedy Special" introduces classic stand-up appearances from The Ed Sullivan Show by legendary comedians George Carlin, Richard Pryor, Joan Rivers, Flip Wilson, Rodney Dangerfield, Jackie Mason, and many others!

programme.title: The Best of The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: Ed Sullivan presents Johnny Mathis, The Fifth Dimension, Richard Pryor, and Peter Nero.

programme.title: The Very Best of The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: Burt Reynolds hosts a retrospective of the very best moments from The Ed Sullivan Show, featuring performances from some of the biggest stars of music and comedy, stories about the show, interviews from Ed's favorite performers, and so much more!

programme.title: The Best Of Flip Wilson
programme.desc: Flip & Pryor are in tenement politics; it’s parent’s night at school; Pryor does stand-up and the whole cast winds up in the hospital.

programme.title: The Best Of Flip Wilson
programme.desc: Richard Pryor does stand-up and joins Flip for sketches including This Is Your Life Geraldine Jones hosted by Ralph Edwards.

programme.title: The Best Of Flip Wilson
programme.desc: Flip, Conway & Pryor do interpretive prop sketches with a chair; Flip counsels lazy friend Calvin (Pryor).

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama gets a crush on her night school teacher (Joseph Campanella) and enlists the family's help to attract his attention.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: The Harper family has more than its hands full when they are asked to watch the Reverend and Mrs. Meechum's 8-year-old grandson. The little brat drives them mad, and when he ends up staying the night, Mama gets irate as only Mama can.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Verna May Rae passes on, Mama finally gets the opportunity to sing "Raytown, O Raytown" on Founder's Day. It's been 50 years since she first auditioned, and this time she will stop at nothing to win.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Finances not only cause Vint and Naomi to separate but also force them to remain living at home with Mama. Mama, on the other hand, is so miserable that she has no alternative but to force them back together.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: After attending a big wedding, Bubba, Iola, and Mama each fantasize about what it would be like to be married and each realizes that, for now, that "heaven can wait!

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When the Tri-State fair comes to Raytown, Mama takes in weekend boarders in order to buy a new stove. All "bed" lam breaks loose when they overbook and the family winds up sleeping together in the same room.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Vint is so embarrassed when Mama brings his childhood lunchbox to work that he accidentally cuts his finger and takes it to his bed, refusing to go back to work.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: To get Aunt Effie to follow her doctor's advice to exercise, Mama persuades her to join a tap dance class at the Senior Citizens Center. Mama soon takes over the class, forming a troupe of blue-haired hoofers that becomes the toast of Raytown.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Naomi is persuaded to join a longtime friend from high school in a women's tag team wrestling match. But when Mama accidentally knocks out the friend, she and Naomi must take on the "Masked Mabels" as the "Queen Bees.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama becomes jealous when Iola spends all her time with her new best friend, Arlene. But she soon discovers that Arlene can hardly wait to get the clinging Iola out of her life.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: The Harpers are chosen as the "typical American family" to be visited by Olga, a "typical Russian homemaker," who not only cleans their house inside and out but also decides to stay.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: A disappointed Bubba refuses to go to his graduation when he learns his parents will not be there. Mama, the valedictorian and speaker for the commencement, won't go without him, and they both nearly miss the ceremony.

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.desc: La víctima era querida y exitosa, lo cual hace que la brutalidad del crimen sea más difícil de entender.

programme.desc: Nadie en una tranquila comunidad residencial vio nada inusual el día en que uno de sus vecinos fue brutalmente atacado y asesinado.

programme.desc: Se encontró el cuerpo de una mujer joven y una pequeña fibra en la ropa de la víctima llevó a la policía de San Diego directamente al asesino más improbable.

programme.desc: La investigación de un asesinato se ve obstaculizada por la falta de un cuerpo, pero la policía encuentra algunos restos carbonizados, incluyendo un diente cuyo relleno contiene propiedades que ayudan a los investigadores a identificar el cadáver.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este episodio clásico de Archivos Forenses la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia de la televisión, Eileen y Derrick Severs desaparecen de su casa en un pequeño pueblo de Gran Bretaña y la policía encuentra evidencia de un crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesinato brutal, muchos sospechosos y pruebas contradictorias, pero los forenses fueron claros en una cosa: el asesino conocía a su víctima. Y eso les dio a los investigadores una ventaja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Talent and looks alone won't get you on the squad. Dreams are made and hopes are crushed as only 46 out of 59 candidates make it into Training Camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy must cut 10 girls to get to the magic number of 36 for the squad. Uniform Fittings gives Kelli a better idea of who has the whole package. As the cuts begin so does emotional end of dreams.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the girls get the DCC look, it helps some and not others. Two surprise guests stop by rehearsal and rock the DCC's world. Kelli has one of the most awkward office visits of all time.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Cameos and Show Group auditions push the new girls and vets to their limits. Melissa Rycroft tries to save a DCC that's hanging by a thread and there is a shocking outcome from a Kelli office visit.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emotions are supercharged as Kelli & Judy make a lot of tough cuts to keep up the quality of the team. Melissa Rycroft offers invaluable field experience.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli finally announces the squad. Injuries threaten the opening of Cowboys training camp. Game Day chaos endangers a flawless performance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of beautiful and talented hopefuls arrive to try out for the best cheerleading team in the world, while many of the returning girls are looking for redemption. New judges increase the pressure of moving on to Finals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Veterans fight for their jobs as new girls try to live their dreams and make DCC Training Camp. Standing in their way is; panel Interviews, solos, an exhausting dance combination and a room full of very tough judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The new candidates' eyes are opened as they get a taste of what it is to be a DCC. As girls struggle to learn the dances, the reality of being "Big Time", sets in. Melissa Rycroft meets the new girls for the first time.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With the first cut looming, the girls must push their dance skills to the limit. Melissa Rycroft works to bring out showmanship. Extra stress is added on Makeover day as the girls try to get the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s the star of Degrassi’s first-ever football game win! The Shep is floored at how much Riley’s improved.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Pushed to the edge by Holly J, Alli begins posting nasty things about her on the “anti-Grapevine” blog, the underground school on-line site.

programme.desc: Jane admits to herself that her issues with her dad go deeper than the divorce – she thinks maybe he did things to her. Jane is very confused and feels alone. Lucas gives Jane a hard time for creating tension between mom and dad.

programme.desc: Dog takes the day off to try his hand at coaching, and assigns Tim and Leland to track down a dangerous fugitive on their own. Can the boys prove they can handle it?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The boys get distracted by the bikini-clad lovelies on Waikiki when they hunt for Lucy, a homeless, alcoholic fugitive. Beth is amused by the boys, but this is serious business: Tim will have to pay the bond if Lucy isn't caught.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog faces a tough personal and professional situation when he must hunt down his friend, Ili, who has helped him on many busts. But now Ili's on the other side of the law, and now Dog must bring her in.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is out to make two grabs on two islands in one day. Part of the team is goes to Kona to nab a woman who skipped her court date. Meanwhile, Dog and the others hunt Patrick, a fugitive who's fighting in an Extreme Boxing event on the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has only a few days to catch a woman nicknamed Cats or forfeit Beth's $10,000 bond. But it won't be easy - Cats is eight months pregnant, so Dog will have to lure her in rather than risk a violent grab.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in for a big surprise after he catches a fugitive named Jonaven in a sting operation.

programme.title: To The Rescue
programme.desc: When dogs need human intervention, dedicated rescue heroes stop at nothing to get them to safety…and to find a forever family.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: In this episode, Peter is pushed to his limits when he tries to save the life of a new mum who has prolapsed her uterus while calving. Julian goes head-to-head with a 300kg boar named Donald who doesn’t want to part with his sharp and dangerous tusks.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter rushes to help a cow who is struggling to give birth. Father and son farmers John and Ian believe the calf is coming backwards, but Peter realises that the job is even more challenging. Time is against him if he's going to save the calf.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Dog chasing a toy car; dog attacks sprinklers; ramp collapses on skaters.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: In Dagenham, a terrified Jack Russell called Phoebe is found abandoned in a travellers’ site full of rubbish. Surrounded by danger and left with a badly broken leg she must undergo a three-hour operation but will she ever be able to walk again?

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Dog plays patty cake and dead; dog balances yard stick on head; cat opening drawer.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian rushes to a mum who's struggling in labour. With the lives of mum and her unborn calf at risk, can Julian save them? Peter meets rescue spaniel, Misty, the adored and constant companion of an elderly lady, who needs urgent surgery.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle loses her baby; Steven and Sammy Jo begin dating, although Steven is in love with Claudia. Fallon continues her affair with Nick, and is jealous to find him visiting Krystle in the hospital.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fallon learns she is pregnant and tells Jeff she is having an abortion; he agrees to divorce her but only if she bears the child. Krystle remains despondent over the loss of her baby; Claudia takes a job with Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis tricks Blake into coming to Rome and further traps him by hiring a gossip photographer to snap suggestive photos of the two; Jeff begs Fallon to cancel her abortion; as Nick confronts Krystle, his consolation gives way to passion.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Nick tells Krystle of his deep feelings for her; Steven and Sammy Jo marry; Fallon cancels her abortion; after the scandal caused by the paparazzi photos of Alexis and Blake, Krystle leaves her husband.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Nick persuades Krystle to leave Blake; Steven and Sammy Jo announce they are married; Blake is attacked by gangsters and blinded when his car is bombed.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle says goodbye to Nick and leaves Denver; Blake offers to adopt Jeff; Cecil blackmails Claudia; Nick accepts Blake's explanation of his brother's death.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: At a party in her honor, Sammy Jo embarrasses the Carringtons and reveals to Fallon that Blake is not her father; Jeff leaves the party with Claudia; Blake tells Krystle his eyesight is restored; Fallon is left unconscious after a car accident.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fallon gives birth to a son; Alexis offers Sammy Jo $25,000 to leave Denver; Jeff and Claudia make love; Krystle accuses Alexis of killing her baby; Alexis learns Krystle and Blake are not legally married.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Beatriz se aparece en casa de Esther para ver a Victoria y ella se queda intrigada. Gabriel golpea a Reinaldo para vengar a Griselda. Griselda le ofrece dinero a Iris por el secreto de Teresa Cristina. José sospecha que Bárbara anda tramando algo.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler

programme.title: Marido en alquiler

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To run through a vertical obstacle course. Contestants will put their head inside the box with 24 rats. To cross a plank suspend between to speeding semi-trucks.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Celebrity 2. To move flags from one open window across and around the outside of a building. To separate and move white snakes out of a group of green. To escape from a submerged cage and swim to a life ring.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants enter the water where there is a 30-yard long tunnel. Unhatched duck's embryo boiled 30 minutes and then served. Contestants must ride a bicycle across a 10" wide plank that is suspended between two buildings.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To jump from moving helicopter onto a floating platform. Place 60 pink toed tarantulas into torture hat and stay still for 3 minutes. The contestant lies in a plexi-glass tube as water is pumped in.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To stand naked in public. Contestants have to eat 0-5 live Madagascar hissing cockroaches. Players are wrapped in heavy chain around their ankles and submerged into a tank of water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To gather as many flags as possible. To play a game of pool and eat the assigned items. To run across shipping containers planting flags.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To jump from one roof to the other roof. To search for and eat coagulated blood balls hidden in earthworms. To escape from a submerged fuselage.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Clip show of the greatest moments from Season 2.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To unlock the Fear Factor straight-jacket the quickest. To gather the most flags the fastest.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To Swim with Alligators. Spin on a turntable and eat the assigned buffet. Players need to make their way through the inside of a runaway Tanker Truck to retrieve a key and unlock the box.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Everyone knows Bigfoot, an enormous truck that crushes everything in its path. Contestant descends into 10-foot high tank filled with water and ribbon snakes. Suspended from a 40 ton crane hangs a clear Plexiglas box.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Three steel girders are attached to a crane, 100 feet off the ground. Contestant walks on broken glass. A car is held up by an electromagnetic crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Our contestants will have to negotiate 70-ton crane with a seesaw. Contestants eat cooked deer, elk, beef or water buffalo pisel, penis. Our contestants will try to walk across a series of swings.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The Big Tujunga Dam towers hundreds of feet high. Contestant's head and shoulders will be covered in bees. The contestants will lie in a small Plexiglas coffin which has holes drilled in the bottom and on the sides.

programme.title: Festive Fireplace
programme.desc: Cozy up to the special edition fireplace, just in time for the Holidays. The soft crackling of burning wood will turn your home into a calming retreat.

programme.title: Festive Fireplace
programme.desc: Cozy up to the special edition fireplace, just in time for the Holidays. The soft crackling of burning wood will turn your home into a calming retreat.

programme.title: Festive Fireplace
programme.desc: Cozy up to the special edition fireplace, just in time for the Holidays. The soft crackling of burning wood will turn your home into a calming retreat.

programme.title: Ong Bak 2: The Beginning
programme.desc: Tony Jaa stars in this epic tale of revenge set hundreds of years in the past. This prequel to Ong-Bak: The Thai Warrior takes Jaa's skills to the next level, showcasing him as a master of a wide range of martial arts styles.

programme.title: Rage Of The Master
programme.desc: A kung fu school's master is killed by a disgruntled former student. Now a casino owner and the master's children seek out the help of Tiger Wong to get revenge.

programme.title: Double Dragon
programme.desc: Evil meets its match in this daring martial arts adventure about two teen brothers out to stop an obsessed tycoon from finding both halves of a mystical talisman.

programme.title: Lady Bloodfight
programme.desc: Upon arriving in Hong Kong, an American woman is beaten up and mugged by thugs. She's taken in by a martial arts master who trains her for a formidable fight competition known as the Kumite.

programme.title: The Knight Of Shadows
programme.desc: Legendary demon hunter Pu Songling (Jackie Chan) investigates the kidnapping of young girls by evil forces, embarking on a perilous journey to save humanity in this action-packed martial arts comedy.

programme.title: Crazy Samurai: 400 vs 1
programme.desc: When a samurai arrives to duel the disgraced Yoshioka, he walks into an ambush. In the world’s first 77-minute, one-take samurai action film, he fights for his life against 400 warriors, earning a place in history as CRAZY SAMURAI MUSASHI.

programme.title: One-Percent Warrior
programme.desc: After his devastatingly fast, samurai-style combat approach sets filmmakers against him, a legendary action star (Tak Sakaguchi) films his own movie—on turf claimed by feuding yakuza gangs, including Japan’s deadliest martial arts assassin.

programme.title: Foggy Mountain
programme.desc: The film revolves around the story of Phi - a retired martial artist, longing for a peaceful life with a beautiful wife named Lanh.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Mojito's, un restaurante cubano en Brooklyn. Los dueños compraron el restaurante como recién casados, pero ahora tienen siete años de un matrimonio y un negocio que se desmorona.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Ridgewood, Nueva Jersey, para rejuvenecer a Bazzini, un restaurante italiano obstaculizado por un servicio lento y un personal de cocina mediocre.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Nueva Jersey, el chef Ramsay visita Flamango's, un restaurante obsoleto que necesita ayuda.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Filadelfia, Pensilvania, para visitar Hot Potato Cafe. Encuentra a un dueño agotado por la pasión que ha creado un ambiente tóxico lleno de negatividad.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Ramsay descubre que el restaurante mexicano Mama Rita's sufre de una cocina desorganizada. Mientras tanto, la dueña puede tener que sacrificar una amistad para salvar su negocio.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay encuentra una segunda ubicación fallida de un restaurante familiar.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Lido di Manhattan, un local italiano con una cocina antiestética y un propietario sin experiencia. Está tan horrorizado que cierra el lugar temporalmente.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay pasa por un restaurante francés y descubre que él y el jefe de cocina tienen una formación culinaria similar. Sin embargo, el chef niega la mala calidad de la comida de su restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Anna Vincenzo's, un restaurante familiar en Boca Raton, Florida. Se entera de que el obstinado dueño no acepta el cambio. Después de que se ignoran sus ideas, Ramsay se marcha.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Fleming, un restaurante danés en Miami. El obstinado dueño no quiere actualizar el lugar y Ramsay descubre algo en la hielera que lo lleva a cerrar el restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita el Pabellón Español en Nueva Jersey. Descubre que un par de hermanos en disputa están llevando el restaurante al suelo. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay llega a un restaurante endeudado propiedad de dos ex meseras y las cosas están tan mal que Ramsay realiza una intervención para abordar el tema del liderazgo.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: PJ's Steakhouse se está muriendo por la falta de control de la gerencia en la calidad de la comida, con un dueño un poco grosero y su esposo, el copropietario, sentados en el bar bebiendo todo el día.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay hace el viaje a Carlstadt, Nueva Jersey, para visitar Grasshopper Also, un restaurante que ha visto días mejores. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In a 1992 murder case, the autopsy of a cremated body turns up telltale clues of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was a self-made man who never minced words. Perhaps he was murdered by a disgruntled client or employee. Perhaps the racy photos in his safe held the clue to solving the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The police investigate when a severed leg is discovered among garbage. Conventional means of identifying the victim are impossible, leading investigators to rely on DNA, forensic anthropology and toxicology.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young couple decided to celebrate their first wedding anniversary with a camping trip to Mount Hood. During the trip, the husband was shot and killed. Later, his wife told two different versions of the events which led to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For six years, a serial killer prowled the streets of New York City. He wrote letters to police and The New York Post, indicating he would kill twelve people — one for each astrological sign.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an elderly couple died in a suspicious house fire, their son became the prime suspect. Investigators turned to forensic science to determine if the fire had been set deliberately, or if it was an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of Katie Poirier is stymied by the lack of a body. Finally, investigators use a single tooth found among some charred remains to identify her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, San Diego police are baffled by a pair of hands found in a dumpster. Through further investigation, they determine that the hands are those of missing person Don Hardin.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When hunters reported finding a skull in a Texas canyon, police immediately began an investigation. With a forensic artist's reconstruction, police eventually learned the victim's identity. Now all they had to do was find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspect's former lover comes forward with a fantastic tale of murder, mutilation and cremation. But there's no way to test the story's validity — until a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist conduct tests where the cremation supposedly occurred.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family were executed in their own home. For three years, the murders went unsolved. Finally, a 30-year-old box of ammunition and some fluorescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting leaves one man dead and another seriously wounded. Cell phone calls and shell casings point to a suspect, but authorities are unable to place him at the crime scene. A forensic geologist proves that dirt is anything but dumb.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a successful stockbroker doesn't return home after a late shift, his wife reports him missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, the body of young mother Summer Baldwin was found in a suitcase in a Texas landfill.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called about a dead body, a background check on the victim leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks — all fronted by elderly couple Ray and Faye Copeland.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a passerby finds the torso of a woman in a cardboard box. A forensic entomologist analyzes nearby insect activity to determine when the victim was killed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a windy Kansas night in 1995, a mysterious fire swept through the home of a prominent doctor. In the debris, investigators found evidence which told them how the fire started.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Lives changed in the 20 years following an unsolved murder, and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of employees' jobs. Forensic investigators must determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search when the mother of two young children went missing. Twenty years after her body was found, new technology recontextualized old evidence and pointed directly to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was brutally murdered in her home and the only witnesses to the crime were the family dogs. An expert in canine behavior was convinced the killer knew both the victim and the animals, and he was determined find out what the dogs had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was well liked and successful, which made the brutality of the crime even harder to understand.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1990, Shirley Andronowich's body was found mutilated. Eyewitnesses told police she had a fight with her husband the night before, but forensic evidence proved that he had nothing to do with her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Nevada politician Kathy Augustine died mysteriously during a re-election campaign. The medical examiner could neither isolate the cause of death, nor explain the tiny puncture wounds discovered during the autopsy.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is killed while walking her dogs in the woods. Since she has no enemies and her husband has an alibi, police assume it's a hunting accident — until they find a strange letter, allegedly written by the woman before her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, evidence suggests that he knew his killer. With just three hairs and some microscopic cells, police unravel a web of lies and find the motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.desc: Marty has a confusing meeting with Roscoe's new crush, Lex. Jeannie makes a power move at Galweather to win an account, and Clyde witnesses Monica push a junior analyst a bit too far.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Marty and Jeannie put their plan into action to pit their rival clients against one another. Changes at Galweather promise trouble for Jeannie. Clyde is forced to work from Monica's home.

programme.title: F is for Family
programme.desc: Frank struggles to make good on his promises to Bill and Maureen. Vic gets a rude surprise on his first day back at the radio station.

programme.title: F is for Family
programme.desc: A lunch date sends Sue even deeper into a funk, Bill discovers a different side of his grandfather, and a desperate Vic offers to record Kevin's band.

programme.title: F is for Family
programme.desc: While Frank and his dad tend to an emergency at the airport, Sue spends a maddening night at the hospital, and Bill takes a beating in the hockey rink.

programme.title: F is for Family
programme.desc: Frank's pledge to be a better father and husband by one calamity after the next, leading to an epic meltdown at Lamaze class.

programme.title: F is for Family
programme.desc: Eager to make his mark as an alderman, Rosie heads to City Hall - only to find out the crooked mayor has his own plans for the Twelfth Ward.

programme.title: F is for Family
programme.desc: A string of good luck lifts the mood at the Murphy house. But a family outing to the fourth-grade play unleashes a fresh wave of chaos.

programme.title: F is for Family
programme.desc: While Frank and the Mohican crew head to X-ray training in Cleveland, Vic gives Kevin and the band a total makeover for Kweezetoberfest.

programme.title: F is for Family
programme.desc: As Sue sets out on a star-crossed trek to the hospital, Frank races to catch a flight home - and vows to settle things with his dad once and for all.

programme.title: F is for Family

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley

programme.desc: Amy must face a difficult truth when her efforts to help a young girl form a connection with her new horse take an unexpected turn. Meanwhile, Lou faces harsh criticism as mayor.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy grudgingly helps Ty's mother Lily with a traumatized racehorse. Lou gets into even more hot water when she tries to sell Hudson as a 'must-see' tourist destination.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Disaster strikes Hudson when a train derails and causes an explosion that threatens the town. A wild fire quickly spreads toward the rodeo grounds and Amy rushes to save the abandoned horses there.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: The wild black stallion that Amy rehomed from Will's ranch is brutally forced out of the herd by the new leader, leaving Amy to track down the injured horse and nurse him back to health.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: A group of wild horses needs new homes. Amy must get back to her Miracle Girl roots and host her first horse clinic in over a year.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Tim seeks out help from an unlikely person when he finds himself competing in a polo match. Amy is concerned her daughter isn't adjusting well to her new reality.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Caleb finds a memento from the past that he thinks will have special meaning for Amy. But surprisingly, it's Jack who has some mixed emotions stirred up by the gift.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Quinn's wealthy father arrives at Heartland with a life-changing proposition for both Amy and his son.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy works with a challenging horse to help a friend of Clint's. She also revives a dream to rebuild the jumping course that she and Spartan practiced on so many years ago.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy must help a skeptical performer and her pair of matched liberty horses work together again.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: A wild stallion escapes from Sam's ranch during a burglary and Amy will stop at nothing to find him.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos se enfrentan en un desafío de preparación de alimentos que recompensa a los ganadores por la oportunidad de pasar tiempo con el Chef Ramsay fuera de la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los concursantes restantes que preparen el desayuno para los miembros del servicio visitantes. El equipo ganador tendrá tiempo libre y los perdedores tendrán el rol de patrullar la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el cuarto día, los Chefs restantes compiten en una prueba de degustación con los ojos vendados. Los perdedores deben aceptar un castigo difícil mientras los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Para avanzar en este desafío, los siete Chefs restantes deben comprar y preparar la comida para la recepción de una boda.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Melissa se une a los hombres en una competencia para ver qué equipo puede preparar los mejores platos de langosta. Pero hay un problema: los equipos deben matar primero a sus crustáceos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis concursantes restantes deben preparar aperitivos y platos principales con las sobras, por lo que ambos equipos deben crear sus propios menús de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay consolida a los cinco concursantes restantes en un equipo, pero primero deben competir entre sí para impresionar a 100 estudiantes de secundaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los tres Chefs restantes preparan versiones gourmet de platos estadounidenses clásicos para jueces externos: sus madres, que no saben qué platos están probando.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos últimos competidores se enfrentan a un desafío final que implica algo más que cocinar: deben diseñar y administrar sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los ánimos se enfurecen cuando los dos concursantes preparan un último servicio de cena para el chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa para una cuarta temporada de torturas culinarias. Quince Chefs competirán por la oportunidad de trabajar en el propio restaurante de Ramsay en Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío de la temporada encuentra a los concursantes cortando a un rodaballo en finos filetes de 180 gramos. Un miembro de cada equipo debe actuar como camarero durante el servicio de comidas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después de que las gallinas los despiertan en sus habitaciones, los concursantes deben cocinar para la cena familiar lo que al principio les cantó.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos compiten para hacer la mayor cantidad posible de pasta para la cena de la noche, y un accidente en la cocina lleva a un competidor al hospital.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Jason and Maggie are in for a surprise when an anniversary party is planned without their knowledge.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Mike gets a part-time job, but he's upset upon realizing his racist boss favors him because he's white.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Jason and Maggie dole out punishments to the kids based on gender, they're accused of sexism.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: In Carol's interview for Boston College - her parents' alma mater - she tries to fail to avoid going there.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Jason tries to help Mike with his psychology homework, Jason does even worse than his son.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Carol's boyfriend Sandy doesn't show up for a date, Sandy's friend reveals Sandy has been in an accident.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Wally and Irma invite everyone to a wedding on the same ship where they first met.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Jason apologizes to everyone, while Irma and Wally are married.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Mike announces his plans to marry Julie, he shocks the Seaver household.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: As the big day approaches, Mike begins to have doubts about getting married to Julie.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Carol's college plans are temporarily dashed, she takes an unexpected turn into the work force.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Mike is excited about starting a new acting class, but his arrogant teacher has "artistic" ideas about acting.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Carol feels pressure from her family to start dating again and pretends an older man is her new boyfriend.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Ben gets bad advice from Mike and finds himself in trouble after he's caught selling Carol's old term papers.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Mike gets his first TV role - an ill-fated cop in a primetime drama.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Career opportunities force Jason and Maggie to reconsider their working arrangement.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Jason and Maggie decide they want to break their mutual contract regarding their work-life balance.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Mike takes a newspaper route to earn extra money, he tries to make Ben deliver the papers.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Ed and Kate give each grandchild an early inheritance of $5,000 in cash, Jason and Maggie can only watch.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Carol gets promoted at work and wants to postpone entering college, but her parents are adamant she should go.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Ben and Mike drive to the store for school supplies, they meet two girls who lead them on an adventure.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: While rehearsing a play for his acting class, Mike and his fellow actor Kate fall madly in love.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: The love triangle between Mike, Kate, and David becomes even more complicated after Mike expresses feelings.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When the guests for a family party arrive 24 hours earlier than expected, Jason Seaver and his family panic.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Ben asks for permission to have an ear pierced, Jason and Maggie argue over who gets the final word.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: When Mike takes Kate for a Valentine's Day dinner, he's shocked to discover their waitress is his ex-fiancé.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Mike suddenly finds himself back at Dewey High School - only this time he's a student, not a teacher.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: While test-driving Mike's old car, Carol gets stopped by a policeman and ends up in jail.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Maggie Seaver fears she may have had her youngest daughter too late in life.

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Ben must choose between cheating on his upcoming science exam or actually studying for it.

programme.title: Delia Smith's Christmas

programme.title: Jamie's Best Ever Christmas

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Julia Child prepares simple and beautiful desserts for every occasion. She demonstrates other uses for pastry shells, makes French custard fillings, strawberry tarts, and apple tarts, and shows how to glaze fruit tarts.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Julia Child is all about caramel and makes two handsome and easy molded desserts -- Caramel Custard and Apple Souffle.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Julia Child whips up two famous French desserts -- Chocolate Mousse and Caramel Custard -- showing how to beat egg yolks and sugar, how to caramelize a mold, how to make and bake a custard and how to unmold a dessert.

programme.title: The French Chef

programme.title: The French Chef

programme.desc: Lucy plays the dominant parent role in their son's life. Realizing that he needs to spend more time with his son, Ricky agrees to spend his vacation at home to care for little Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky's thirteenth anniversary is rapidly approaching. In an outward show of affection, they buy each other gifts—golf clubs for Ricky and fur for Lucy.

programme.desc: The Ricardos are being interviewed for a "day-in-the-life" magazine article on happy married couples. The interviewer arrives at 7 AM just in time to encounter Lucy making breakfast in a frilly lace apron, while Ricky walks in wearing a smoking jacket.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes get a pair of new tenants. Sam and Nancy Johnson are from Texas and reportedly have inside knowledge of a certain oil stock that is about to shoot through the roof. Lucy and Ethel are excited by the prospect, but Fred and Ricky have doubts.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: How long can Ricky Ricardo go, without losing his temper? When Lucy buys a new hat for $49.50, Ricky goes ballistic. To make a point, Lucy bets Ricky the cost of the hat that he'll lose his temper long before her next purchase.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Hurt that no one seems to care for his home movies, Ricky declares that he will never show them another feature of his...not even the TV pilot he's creating. Jealous of his project, Lucy enables the help of the Mertzes and creates her own musical western.

programme.desc: Ricky scoffs at his wife and Ethel when they adamantly participate in the hunt for the "Bonus Buck" that will win them prize money from a newspaper contest. Later, Ricky discovers one of the lucky bucks in his own wallet.

programme.desc: Lucy desperately wants to accompany her husband on his concert tour of Hawaii, but Ricky can't afford to bring her along. Unsatisfied, Lucy decides she'll win a trip for herself and neighbors, The Mertzes, by entering a television game show contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In an attempt to compete with her wealthy friends, Lucy pledges $500 (that she doesn't have) to charity. Luckily, Ethel spots an ad in Billboard magazine willing to pay $500 to anyone willing to perform a stunt to publicize a new movie, Women From Mars.

programme.desc: Lucy wants to be a published author after hearing about another housewife who made a fortune doing it. Ricky and the Mertzes don't like it when they discover Lucy's book plays too close a resemblance to real life including anecdotes from their own lives.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En julio de 1996, dos hombres entraron en una casa de empeño en Birmingham, Alabama, y asesinaron sin piedad a los empleados. Para desconocimiento de los asesinos, una cámara secreta de vigilancia grabó el tiroteo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A principios de los años ochenta, la decapitación de un joven afroamericano llevó al Departamento de Policía de Miami-Dade y al FBI a lo largo de un rastro de asesinatos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El 26 de febrero de 1993, una explosión sacudió el estacionamiento del Centro Mundial de Comercio. Seis personas murieron y más de mil resultaron heridas en la explosión que dejó un cráter de cinco pisos en el edificio.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Claude Dallas vivía la vida de un vaquero. Un solitario y desconfiado de la autoridad, vivía de la tierra, practicando la caza furtiva y vendiendo pieles.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Los estragos de un asesino en serie fueron descubiertos cuando los cuerpos de varias mujeres jóvenes comenzaron a aparecer en tumbas poco profundas que salpicaron el ambiente silvestre de Alaska.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Los residentes de la pequeña ciudad de Noel, Misuri, quedaron sorprendidos cuando uno de sus bancos fue robado.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El día antes de Acción de Gracias, una madre descubrió que su hijo de 10 años había desaparecido de la escuela. Nadie sabía cómo podía haber sucedido. En pocas horas, toda la familia del niño estaba desesperada buscándolo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En el suroeste, un ladrón en serie de bancos afirmaba que su botín era para los pobres, pero este ladrón no era ningún héroe popular, pues tenía un arma y estaba dispuesto a disparar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando un auto bomba estalla en Washington D. C. y se cobra las vidas de un exembajador y su secretaria, el FBI entra en el caso y comienza a investigar varios hechos que constituían una red de conspiración a gran escala.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Puerto Rico, combatientes violentos intentaron convertir el estado autónomo de Estados Unidos en una dictadura comunista.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En una tarde de verano en la lujosa Lodi, California, una niña de doce años es secuestrada de su casa. Muchos oficiales de policía y agentes del FBI se reunieron, determinados a encontrar a la pequeña antes de que fuera demasiado tarde.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A principios de los 90, las bandas de drogas aterrorizaron Harlem, los vecindarios de Nueva York.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Arizona, un cargamento de dinero desapareció en el desierto junto con los dos hombres contratados para vigilarlo. El FBI no sabía si los guardias eran participantes o víctimas de una emboscada.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En el condado Lincoln, Nebraska, un traficante de drogas fugitivo se involucró en un tiroteo con policías, hiriendo a dos de ellos, y evitó la captura después de una persecución a alta velocidad.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Pauly scrambles to get Deena and Angelina on board with a family dinner before Nikki arrives. But a mob of raccoons almost foils his plan. Meanwhile, back in Jersey, Jenni is having some major fomo.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Angelina and Deena have buried the hatchet, and the family vacation can officially begin. But Jenni's arrival is about the change everything.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: JWOWW and Angelina put the A in awkward at family dinner. Afterwards, the guys are at a loss so Ronnie calls in a favor from Dr. Drew to see if he can help bring the family back together.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Dr. Drew helps mediate the conflict between Angelina and Jenni. A messy situation is about to get messier when Deena learns her private conversation with Mike wasn't so private. Mike and Lauren get the best news of their lives.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: RSVP plan Angelina's wedding redo. Uncle Nino is officiating and Vinny is giving the wedding speech. What could go wrong?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Ten months after a bridesmaids speech almost destroyed the family, Angelina gets her wedding redo, while Mike tries to keep his secret until after the festivities.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: The gang is back together and big changes are in the air. Pauly D has a new look, Vinny is looking for a new home, and when social media explodes with rumors about Angelina & Chris's marriage, Mike takes on a new alter ego -The Investigation.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: The honeymoon might be over for Angelina after Chris moves out. But Mike has a lot to celebrate as he reaches his five-year soberversary. To mark the occasion the roomies throw a parade in his honor and the surprise return of a certain roommate.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Snooki returns to celebrate Mike's five-year Soberversary, and the roommates begin to plan their next big family vacation. But everything comes to a screeching halt when a wild rumor surfaces involving Angelina, her marriage, and chicken tenders.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: A boozy brunch with Snooki and Angelina goes sideways when Snooki spills the beans about the video "evidence" of Angelina in Old Bridge. Chris moves back home. And the roommates head to the Poconos for their big winter vacation.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Jenni has a huge announcement. But before the celebration can begin, the roommates must deal with the elephant in the room currently casting a rather large shadow over their Poconos vacation - videos of Angelina and her mystery man in Old Bridge, NJ.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Vinny suffers an unspeakable loss; Angelina confronts Jenni about the videos; and the roommates try their hand at winter sports.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: A horse race leaves Deena confused, Angelina has herself a meatball day, and the guys get their wrestling on when they step into the ring with Jenni's pro-wrestler fiancé.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Floyd Steven’s jealousy is leading Alqueisha “Quey” Benjamin to consider breaking it off. Quey is becoming an alcoholic because of his controlling ways, but Floyd has caught her in a few lies and suspects her of cheating!

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Yaminah suffered from post-partum depression and says Tremaine wasn't there for her when she needed him. Tremaine blames a violent upbringing for his communication problems.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Shortly after tying the knot Diana gave Robert an ultimatum: they'd either have an open relationship or she was gone. He wants to save the marriage, but she isn't ready to compromise. Can Diana finally settle with one man, or is this really the end?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Amir says Roosevelt needs to propose soon or this relationship is over. Roosevelt says they're not ready for marriage because he can't trust Amir.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Angel is suing her husband, James, because she alleges he forced her to take out thousands of dollars in loans to support his womanizing and drinking habits.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Clifford feels that Asia is always searching for things that aren’t there. Asia says she is done with Clifford and the way he uses social media to flirt and cheat with women. Can Judge Lynn Toler help put a stop to the arguing?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Maya says being quarantined with Tiana made her realize they had little to nothing in common. The relationship ended but Maya wants closure but can't get that without the money Tiana owes her.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Brianna says Steven constantly looks at other women behind her back which has taken a toll on her confidence. He says her overprotectiveness leads to arguments that end up with her accusing him of cheating.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Constance was devastated when she caught her husband cheating. After kicking him out of the house, she is doubtful the marriage can be repaired.

programme.title: People's Court

programme.title: People's Court
